raw_title: Aspirational Metajournalism: What Nieman Journalism Lab Predictions Reveal About Platform and Audience Imaginaries
title_en: Aspirational Metajournalism: What Nieman Journalism Lab Predictions Reveal About Platform and Audience Imaginaries
title_zh: 抱负性元新闻学：尼曼新闻实验室预测揭示的平台与受众想象
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了尼曼新闻实验室的预测内容，探讨新闻行业如何想象数字平台和未来受众。它揭示了新闻从业者对技术发展和读者行为的期望与愿景。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes predictions from the Nieman Journalism Lab to explore how the journalism industry imagines digital platforms and future audiences. It reveals the expectations and visions journalists hold about technological developments and reader behavior.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注新闻行业对未来发展的集体想象，特别是数字平台和受众关系的演变趋势。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on the collective imagination within journalism about future developments, particularly the evolving relationship between digital platforms and audiences.
